name: Zen
description: __Occupation:__ LFG's CEO He is the CEO of the Loveland Financial Group, and manages investments and financial concerns. At first glance, he can be perceived as cold, reserved and difficult to please. He appears hard to approach and disinterested in everything, other than the prosperity of his company. Later on, he shows a softer side to reveal he is not so cold as he presents himself. ~!Zen's Evol ability, Time Control allows him to manipulate his surroundings by freezing and manipulating time.

name: Kanata Yatonokami
description: __Height:__ (Publicly) 165 cm Elder twin brother of the Yatonokami family. He is an orphan in a poor city, raised by adults who oppressed him; thus he hardly trusts anyone. He is careless and tends to find things troublesome, but is devoted and will do anything for his twin brother, Nayuta. As of now, both of the twins are living off the money that they make from rapping for shady underground business.

name: Kashuu Kiyomitsu
description: The uchigatana that is said to have been used by Shinsengumi's Okita Souji. Perhaps because he was born in an impoverished environment, he believes that as long as he keeps himself pretty he will be loved by his owner. Seemingly the polar opposite of [Yamatonokami Yasusada](https://anilist.co/character/120569/Yamatonokami-Yasusada) with whom he quarrels all the time, they are good friends in reality.

name: Lucia Konohana
description: __Height:__ 167 cm Lucia is a heroine of Rewrite who is the class representative of Kotarou's class, and as such as a strong sense of responsibility and justice. She is a strong, fastidious girl who often must get involved with Kotarou's exploits when he gets out of line. ~! Lucia is a member of Guardian and her abilities are a result of genetic engineering by Guardian, who wishes to create human beings capable of living in the wasteland that Earth would eventually turn into in a thousand years.
